scripts.test:e2e: cd e2e && pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:install: cd e2e && CI=1 pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec playwright install chromium chromium-headless-shell
scripts.test:e2e:install:force: cd e2e && CI=1 pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec playwright install --force chromium chromium-headless-shell
